calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Vacated

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-546340, CGC-16-551188, CGC-16-551569, CGC-16-552237, CGC-16-553166 WITH CASE CGC-15-548037
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Amy E. Hammond of Grotefeld Hoffmann Schleiter et al LLP (415-344-9670) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party, Granite State Insurance Company

Attorney, Amanda Stevens of Schroeder Loscotoff (916-438-8300) appears telephonically for plaintiff, Nevada Capital Insurance Company in related action CGC-16-551569

Attorney, Alexander J. Berline of Hanson Bridgett LLP (415-995-5035) appears telephonically as counsel for plaintiffs Norma Mulligan, Patrick Mulligan, 2936-2938 Lyon Street Home Owners in related action CGC-15-546340

Attorney, Bryan E. Stofferahn of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'Meara LLP (510-540-4881) appears as counsel for defendant AV-LIL Investments LLC in related action CGC-16551569

The cause is argued and submitted by all sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court modifies and confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF GRANITE STATE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-546340, CGC-16-551188, CGC-16-551569, CGC-16-552237, CGC-16-553166 WITH CASE CGC-15-548037 is DENIED without prejudice to Granite State Insurance Company filing a motion to intervene in the Mulligan action if it so wishes. The Mulligan Action involves many factual allegations beyond the fire, as well as different parties, causes of action and requested remedies. My ruling is without prejudice to a motion to consolidate the other five pending actions, which are more closely related. Moreover, plaintiffs in the Mulligan Action express willingness to coordinate discovery with the other cases - a step I encourage. Prevailing party to submit a [proposed] written order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
